title: Metrics Manifest
description: Canonical mapping of every metric to its source, tier, consuming surface(s), and migration path. DEC-070: every metric traces to a structured spine event, emitted by hooks, queried from Loki.

tiers.T1: Structured spine event → Loki query (gold standard)
tiers.T2: Vikunja API / board-ts CLI (structured but not spine)
tiers.T3: Git log grep / file scan / computed remainder (kill these)

metrics.name: Total cards
metrics.migration: none — T2 is correct for board state

metrics.name: Done card count
metrics.migration: none

metrics.name: Open card count
metrics.migration: none

metrics.name: Done cards by owner role
metrics.migration: none

metrics.name: Directing stage count (Now + Next + Later)
metrics.migration: none — bucket counts are ground truth

metrics.name: Building stage count (WIP + Harvesting)
metrics.migration: none

metrics.name: Ideas count
metrics.migration: none

metrics.name: Ops/uncategorized count
metrics.source_target: Sum non-standard buckets from board-ts buckets output
metrics.migration: Phase 3: Parse all bucket names from board-ts buckets. Sum counts for buckets NOT in {Now, Next, Later, WIP, Harvesting, Ideas, Done, Won't Do}. Eliminates remainder math that breaks when bucket structure changes.

metrics.name: Won't Do card count
metrics.source_current: Label scan on done tasks looking for 'wontdo' label, fallback to bucket count
metrics.migration: Phase 3: Use bucket_counts.get("Won't Do", 0) directly. Remove label scan loop entirely. The bucket count IS ground truth — the label scan was a workaround for when buckets weren't available.

metrics.name: Shipped (Done minus Won't Do)
metrics.migration: none — derived metric, improves when wont_do moves to T2

metrics.name: Weekly throughput (cards shipped per week)
metrics.source_current: Git commit message grep for 'done/shipped/session close/accepted' + card # extraction
metrics.source_target: Loki query: card.accepted events grouped by week
metrics.loki_group: sum by (week) — derive week from timestamp
metrics.migration: Phase 3: Add query_loki() helper. Query card.accepted events from Loki. Group by ISO week. Dedup by card_id. Returns last 6 weeks. Fallback: empty {} with data_window note.
metrics.historical_gap: Spine events start ~2026-03-01. Pre-March shows 0. Accepted per DEC-070.

metrics.name: Brief exchange counts by role pair
metrics.source: Filesystem scan of briefs/ directories, header parsing
metrics.migration: none — filesystem IS ground truth for brief existence. Could upgrade to T1 via brief.handoff.written events, but filesystem scan is reliable and covers history.
metrics.note: Phase 2 adds brief.handoff.read event for read-latency tracking (currently only .acknowledged exists)

metrics.name: Cards accepted (proving gate)
metrics.migration: none — already T1. Phase 3: migrate from file grep to Loki query for consistency.

metrics.name: Cards rejected
metrics.migration: none — already T1

metrics.name: Rejection rate (%)
metrics.migration: none — derived from T1 sources

metrics.name: TypeScript build count
metrics.migration: none — already T1

metrics.name: Deploy count (from spine only)
metrics.migration: none — already T1. But operations.deploys double-counts this (see t3_kill #5).

metrics.name: WIP card age in days
metrics.source: board-ts list + board-ts view (created date → age calc)
metrics.migration: none — board API is correct source for card creation date

metrics.name: Session count
metrics.source_current: Git commit message grep for 'session close/reboot/start'
metrics.migration: Phase 3: Query Loki for session.role.started events in date range. Count distinct. No dedup needed — each event is a unique session start.

metrics.name: Deploy count (unified)
metrics.source_current: Git commit grep for 'deploy' PLUS chorus.log file grep for deploy.pipeline.completed — DOUBLE COUNTS
metrics.migration: Phase 3: Query Loki for deploy.pipeline.completed only. Remove git grep entirely. Remove chorus.log supplement. Single source, no double-count.
metrics.bug: Current implementation adds git-grep deploys AND spine deploys, causing double-count when both sources have the same deploy

metrics.name: Git commit count
metrics.migration: none — git IS the source of truth for commits. Could supplement with build.commit.created from Loki but git is authoritative.

metrics.name: Data window metadata
metrics.migration: Phase 3: Add t3_paths_remaining: 0 to output after all kills complete

event_gaps.issue: werk-init.sh emits brief.handoff.acknowledged but not brief.handoff.read. No read timestamp captured. Cannot compute brief read latency (time from write to read).
event_gaps.emitter: werk-init.sh (retired 2026-04-20 by #2311 — boot context now emitted by chorus-hook-shim session-start)
event_gaps.fix: Emit brief.handoff.read with timestamp when brief file is first opened, before acknowledged. Phase 2 (Silas).
event_gaps.resolved: 2026-03-05 — brief.handoff.read emitted in werk-init.sh boot brief scan, before acknowledged event

event_gaps.issue: card.item.moved has no reason field for Won't Do. Cannot distinguish Done from Won't Do in spine events.
event_gaps.fix: Add reason=wont_do field when card moves to Won't Do bucket. Supports optional reason text as 3rd arg.
event_gaps.resolved: 2026-03-05 — reason field added to card.item.moved event when status matches Won't Do aliases

t3_kill_list.replacement: Sum non-standard buckets from board-ts buckets

t3_kill_list.technique: Label scan on done tasks + fallback

t3_kill_list.replacement: Loki query: card.accepted events grouped by week

t3_kill_list.technique: Git keyword grep + chorus.log file grep (double-count bug)

loki_query_patterns.note: All Loki queries need 5s timeout + graceful empty return. Loki endpoint: http://localhost:3102
loki_query_patterns.helper_function: query_loki() in loom-metrics.sh — reusable for all 3 event queries

verification.after_phase_1: Manifest committed, Phase 2/3 cards exist with AC, briefs delivered
verification.after_phase_2: grep brief.handoff.read chorus.log shows new events after boot
verification.after_phase_3: grep -c 'git.*log' loom-metrics.sh returns 0; both surfaces show same throughput/deploy/session numbers
